privacy.notes: Synthetic metadata-only contract. UDG and AECC source tables, mappings, and grouper payloads are intentionally excluded.

commands.name: list_emergency_transition_records
commands.notes: List synthetic UDG, AECC, and transition-window records without embedding proprietary tables or code rows.

commands.name: validate_emergency_transition_compatibility
commands.notes: Validate a selected year and stream against the declared UDG or AECC support window and reject silent translation.

commands.name: describe_no_proprietary_payload_boundary
commands.notes: Declare what the committed fixtures may include and confirm that proprietary payloads remain absent.

commands.name: resolve_local_emergency_mapping_reference
commands.notes: Record a user-supplied local mapping or grouper reference without committing the restricted content itself.

registry_entry_types.label: Transition window record
registry_entry_types.purpose: Metadata-only declaration of a UDG or AECC pricing-year window and stream scope.

registry_entry_types.label: Versioned classification record
registry_entry_types.purpose: Metadata-only UDG or AECC version label with explicit pricing-year applicability.

registry_entry_types.label: Stream compatibility record
registry_entry_types.purpose: Declared compatibility for emergency department and emergency service inputs.

registry_entry_types.label: Diagnostic record
registry_entry_types.purpose: Synthetic validation or boundary diagnostics for the emergency transition registry.

registry_entry_types.label: No proprietary payload boundary record
registry_entry_types.purpose: Explicit boundary declaration for synthetic fixtures that excludes licensed tables, source code rows, and grouper payloads.

registry_entry_types.label: Local mapping reference
registry_entry_types.purpose: Local placeholder for a user-supplied official mapping or validated local mapping asset.

compatibility_rules.label: Metadata-only registry
compatibility_rules.description: Reject registry entries that embed licensed table rows, proprietary mapping content, or grouper logic.

compatibility_rules.label: Explicit version window
compatibility_rules.description: Require each UDG or AECC record to declare the pricing years in which it is valid.

compatibility_rules.label: Stream scope match
compatibility_rules.description: Require the requested emergency stream to be covered by the selected record before compatibility passes.

compatibility_rules.label: No silent translation
compatibility_rules.description: Do not infer AECC from UDG or UDG from AECC unless an official mapping or validated local mapping reference is supplied.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared payload boundary
compatibility_rules.description: Require every fixture bundle to declare that proprietary payloads and licensed code rows are absent.

compatibility_rules.label: Referential consistency
compatibility_rules.description: Require diagnostics and validation records to reference committed synthetic entries or local placeholders.

examples.name: versioned-transition-registry
examples.description: Synthetic registry snapshot with explicit UDG and AECC version windows and stream compatibility metadata.

examples.name: validation-pass
examples.description: Synthetic compatibility validation example that passes for a supported pricing year and stream.

examples.name: validation-fail
examples.description: Synthetic compatibility validation example that fails for an unsupported pricing year and stream combination.

examples.name: diagnostics
examples.description: Synthetic diagnostics example covering missing classification, no-silent-translation, and metadata-only checks.

examples.name: no-proprietary-payload-boundary
examples.description: Synthetic boundary declaration for fixtures that must not contain proprietary payloads or licensed code rows.
